title: I came to know about my brother’s death only through Google search: Chamba accident victim’s sister
description: A tourist taxi carrying seven visitors from Bengaluru and a local driver is feared to have plunged into a deep gorge along the treacherous Bairagarh-Sach Pass-Killar road in the remote Churah subdivision of Himachal Pradesh’s Chamba district on the night of May 29, leaving all eight occupants feared dead
